title: Send Notion campaign overview link to Paul via Slack/GChat
description: Share the Notion campaign overview document with Paul through Slack or Google Chat so he can review the campaign strategy.

title: Set up Google Ads — launch Monday, $30/day, use promo credit before March 22nd
description: Configure and launch Google Ads campaign with $30/day budget. Must use promo credit before it expires on March 22nd. Target launch: Monday.

title: Forward Google Ads promo email to Paul
description: Forward the Google Ads promotional credit email to Paul so he's aware of the promo details and expiration.

title: Build target brand list (~30 accounts)
description: Research and compile a list of approximately 30 target brand accounts for outbound outreach.

title: Install Meta pixel on EH website
description: Install the Meta (Facebook) tracking pixel on the Element Human website for ad tracking and retargeting capabilities.

title: Draft 5 LinkedIn thought leadership posts for Matt
description: Write 5 LinkedIn posts for Matt positioned as thought leadership content to build authority and engagement.

title: Work with Hamish on 90-second STS video demo
description: Collaborate with Hamish to produce a 90-second video demo of the STS product for Amazon.

title: Create STS FAQ document — format for Amazon internal wiki
description: Draft a comprehensive FAQ document for the STS product, formatted specifically for Amazon's internal wiki standards.

title: Continue on STS 2-pager
description: Continue developing the STS two-page summary document for Amazon stakeholders.

title: Analyze Amazon Monday call transcript — extract feedback for STS collateral
description: Review and analyze the transcript from the Monday call with Amazon. Extract key feedback points to improve STS marketing collateral.

title: Set up LinkedIn intent signal tracking + automated outbound sequences
description: Configure LinkedIn intent signal monitoring and set up automated outbound email/message sequences triggered by intent signals.

title: Lead magnet creation — LinkedIn ads + vertical-specific ABM versions
description: Create lead magnet content for LinkedIn ad campaigns with account-based marketing variations tailored to specific verticals.

title: Meta retargeting ads for website visitors
description: Set up Meta retargeting ad campaigns to re-engage Element Human website visitors.

title: Digital sales rooms per target account
description: Create personalized digital sales rooms for each target account with tailored content and resources.

title: Weekly report cadence: Mondays (not Fridays)
description: Note: weekly reports should be sent on Mondays, not Fridays as previously discussed.

title: Add Paramount/ByteDance to target list
description: Include Paramount and ByteDance in the target brand/account list for outbound outreach.

title: Matt doesn't want to sell to smaller agencies — filter on lead form
description: Add filtering on the lead form to exclude smaller agencies. Matt wants to focus on larger accounts only.

title: Reshape marketing bet/plan — focus on 10 premium brands, argue for 30
description: Adapt the marketing plan based on Paul call: focus specifically on 10 premium media owner brands (Netflix, Disney+, Paramount/Warner Bros/HBO, etc.). Make the argument for targeting 30 to overcompensate. Submit as a bet request into the triage system.

title: Research target brands' annual reports/10-Ks — extract top 5 initiatives per brand
description: All target brands are public companies. Go through their annual reports/10-Ks, use AI to extract top 5 strategic initiatives that align to EH's offering. Use this to tailor messaging per brand.

title: Add competitor keywords to Google Ads — Kantar, Nielsen
description: Paul flagged: make sure Kantar and Nielsen are included as competitor keywords in Google Ads campaigns. Brand lift keywords will be expensive since every competitor bids on them.

title: Launch Google Ads ASAP — use $500 promo credit before expiry
description: Get the bet request submitted so Google Ads can go live. Two campaigns ready: 1) retargeting (90-day visitors, broad keywords), 2) prospecting (SKWS, link click tracking). Budget: $25-50/day per campaign. Promo credit needs to be used soon.

title: Update EH website copy — align messaging to premium brand / niche ICP focus
description: Paul concern: if we drive traffic to the website, the current messaging doesn't reflect the hyper-niche focus on premium media owners and top 10 brands. Update homepage copy. Also plan landing pages for ad campaigns.

title: Create ad landing pages for Google Ads campaigns
description: Build dedicated landing pages to drive Google Ads traffic to (instead of just the main website). Needs aligned messaging for the niche ICP. Can run in parallel with launching ads.

title: Sync with Hamish — create 45-90 sec STS video demo for Amazon
description: Post in group chat, schedule call with Hamish (Paul optional). Create a snackable 45-90 sec video walkthrough for Amazon account managers. Must include: heat map visuals (attention graph), sponsorship + FITO + pause ad formats, respondent survey experience. Audience: Amazon AMs selling to their clients.

title: Update STS 2-pager — add FITO, pause ads, pre-approved pricing details
description: Paul's feedback on the 2-pager: Page 1 should lead with Prime Video environment (no other partner tests ads in PV). Show attention across ads + sponsored content. Page 2: include FITO (First Impression Takeover), pause ads, pre-roll run of site formats. Highlight pre-approved pricing: test up to 3 creatives, 1 free report. Include sample report link and survey link.

title: Add Paramount/Warner Bros/HBO to brand target list as priority
description: Paul flagged Paramount + Warner Bros/HBO as key premium media owners to target. They align with Matt's focus on premium inventory only.
